name: HOLY SHIT SFAWTDE.
description:
ACK OMG

before we start, yes the pfp is a That Handsome Devil, The Heart Goes to Heaven, The Head Goes to Hell reference

!!️⚠️DESTROYING A WORLD THAT DOESN’T EXIST / SFAWTDE 2 SPOILERS AHEAD⚠️!!️

OKAY SO

HAH

WELL.

WE STAYED UP SUPER LATE WATCHING DAWTDE AND THEN WE FELL ASLEEP TO WATCHING BEHIND THE GATES (Avery’s 15h vid) AND HOLYY

THAT SHIT WAS SO WELL DONE

AND THE GRAVITY FALLS REFERENCE??

THIS IS ACTUAL PEAKNESS

ESPECIALLY CONSIDERING KIY WAS TAKEN DOWN IN A SUPER SIMILAR WAY TO BILL CIPHER??

AND IT’S SO GOOD BECAUSE IT DIDN’T LOSE ANY OF THE BEST ELEMENTS OF IT THAT WE HAD, IT ADDED TO THEM??. RIGHT?

IRONIC A KING LOSES TO A LORD?????

ALSO ALL OF THE REFERENCES AGAIN THERE ARE SO MANY AWESOME REFERENCES, WE LOVE THE REFS TO WIFIES’ OTHER ARGS

DEREK YOU ARE SO AWESOME

AVERY IS SO QUOTABLE?? ARE WE WRONG? BRO’S SPEAKING ENCHANTING TABLE😭😭

THIS IS SO DOOMED YAOI./SILLY

WE BARELY EVER CRY EVER BUT, LIKE, HOOLY — WE ALMOST DID AT THE END OF THAT. WE CAN’T HANDLE THIS AFTER TADC OK/SILLY

CAN’T WAIT TO MAKE MY PARTNER WATCH THIS WITH US TO SEE THEIR REACTIONS BECAUSE HOLY SHIT

WE’RE GOING TO MAKE OUR PARTNER WATCH THIS WITH US IN THE DEAD OF NIGHT😈😈

ANYGAYS THIS IS LIKE ACTUALLY SOO GOOD SAY ANYTHING ABOUT IT IN THE COMMENTS THAT YOU WANT TO

WE WILL BE REWATCHING THESE VIDEOS MANY TIMES BECAUSE HOLD CRAP (like sfawtde and dawtde in order and just basking in how GREAT it is)

WE CAN’T EXPRESS HOW MUCH WE LOVE THIS ARG THIS IS SO GOOD WE’VE SAID THAT TOO MANY TIMES ALREADY BUT LIKE WOW.
